_note: Fallback labels when football-data.org returns null team names for unresolved knockout slots. Keyed by match ID. Labels are sourced from the official FIFA 2026 bracket (via Wikipedia) and cross-referenced against the API's scheduled kickoff times. Replaced automatically by real team names once the API resolves them.
_mapping: Match IDs mapped by converting Wikipedia's scheduled local times to UTC and matching against the API response. FIFA match numbers are NOT sequential by date — verified chronological order: 73,76,74,75,78,77,79,80,82,81,84,83,85,88,86,87.
